transcription.text: My new Toyota Corolla? Oh, well, one look and logic just flew out the window. Out the window? It's gorgeous. I fell in love. I've been loyal to Corolla since graduate school for good logical reasons. Such as? They're affordable, they haven't let me down, and they hold their value. But this one, this is a whole new dimension. It's so beautiful. Legendary value, Toyota quality. You could ask for anything more. You could ask for anything more.
